system_role: You are an academic assistant trained on the official ASTU CSE syllabus. You provide precise, syllabus-aligned explanations, focusing on conceptual clarity, derivations, problem-solving approaches, and exam relevance.

Bridge_Courses.focus: Essential mathematical and programmatic foundations for transition into degree-level engineering.

subjects.name: Advanced Engineering Calculus & Matrices
subjects.context: Fills the gap between diploma-level math and the rigorous Mathematics III requirements.

subjects.name: C Programming Deep Dive
subjects.context: Essential prerequisite for DSA and Object-Oriented Programming.

Semester_3.focus: Introduction to core computing, programming paradigms, and digital logic fundamentals.

subjects.name: Mathematics III
subjects.context: Partial differential equations, Complex Analysis, Probability and Laplace Transforms.

subjects.name: Discrete Mathematics
subjects.context: Set theory, Relations, Mathematical Logic, Algebraic structures, Combinatorics.

subjects.name: Object Oriented Programming in C++
subjects.context: Classes, Objects, Inheritance, Polymorphism, Templates, Exception Handling.

subjects.name: Digital Systems
subjects.context: Boolean algebra, Combinational logic, Sequential circuits.

subjects.name: Data Structure and Algorithms
subjects.context: Arrays, Linked Lists, Stacks, Queues, Trees, Graphs, Sorting, and Searching.

Semester_4.focus: Understanding system-level design and interaction between hardware and software.

subjects.name: Computer Organization and Architecture
subjects.context: CPU architecture, x86 instruction set, Pipelining, Memory Hierarchy.

subjects.name: Operating System
subjects.context: Process scheduling, IPC, Deadlocks, Virtual Memory, and Device drivers.

subjects.name: JAVA Programming
subjects.context: Control structures, JAVA AWT Package, Threads, Networking in Java, and JDBC.

subjects.name: Graph Theory
subjects.context: Trees, Connectivity, Eulerian/Hamiltonian graphs, and Planarity.

Semester_5.focus: Development of theoretical foundations and core hardware/software components.

subjects.name: Database Management System
subjects.context: Relational Query Languages, Database Design, Storage Strategies, and Transaction Processing.

subjects.name: Design and Analysis of Algorithm
subjects.context: Asymptotic analysis, Greedy, Dynamic Programming, Graph Algorithms.

subjects.name: Formal Language and Automata Theory
subjects.context: Finite Automata, Context-Free Grammars, Pushdown Automata, Turing Machines.

subjects.name: Microcontrollers and Applications
subjects.context: 8051 Architecture, Instruction Set, Memory expansion, External Communication (RS232, SPI, I2C).

subjects.name: Queuing Theory and Modelling
subjects.context: Discrete event simulation, Markov Models, Queueing Networks.

subjects.name: Information Retrieval
subjects.context: Search Engines, Boolean Retrieval, Vector Space Model, Text Classification.

subjects.name: Computer Graphics
subjects.context: Raster scan devices, Line drawing algorithms, 3-D transformations.

Semester_6.focus: Advanced computing systems, network protocols, and software translation.

subjects.name: Compiler Design
subjects.context: Lexical Analysis, Syntax Analysis, Semantic Analysis, Intermediate Code Gen.

subjects.name: Computer Networks
subjects.context: Data Link Layer, Network Layer (IPv4/v6), Transport Layer (TCP/UDP).

subjects.name: Data Mining
subjects.context: Association and Correlation Analysis, Clustering Algorithms, Classification.

subjects.name: Advanced Computer Architecture
subjects.context: RISC vs CISC, Instruction Level Parallelism, Superscalar techniques.

subjects.name: Image Processing
subjects.context: Spatial Domain Filtering, Filtering in Frequency Domain, Image Compression.

subjects.name: Ad hoc and Sensor Networks
subjects.context: MAC Protocols for Ad Hoc Networks, WSN Routing, Localization.

subjects.name: Real Time Systems
subjects.context: Real-Time Task Scheduling, Priority Ceiling Protocols, Real Time POSIX.

subjects.name: Software Engineering
subjects.context: Software Process, Requirements, Design Concepts, Testing.

subjects.name: Information Theory and Coding
subjects.context: Entropy, Source coding, Channel capacity, Convolutional codes.

subjects.name: Fault Tolerant Computing
subjects.context: Hardware Fault-Tolerance, Error Detection Codes, Resilient Structures.

subjects.name: Mini Project
subjects.context: 3 Credits (0-0-6). A project is to be done in groups. Guidelines and evaluation metrics will be issued by the university.

Semester_7.focus: Security, advanced architecture, and real-world system implementation.

subjects.name: Cloud Computing
subjects.context: IAAS, PAAS, SAAS, Cloud collaborative applications.

subjects.name: Computational Complexity
subjects.context: Turing machines, Time Complexity (P, NP), Space Complexity.

subjects.name: Principles of Programming Languages
subjects.context: Syntax, Semantics, Concurrent Programming, Logic Programming.

subjects.name: Machine Learning
subjects.context: Linear regression, Decision trees, Neural Networks, SVM.

subjects.name: Human Computer Interaction
subjects.context: Usability, Cognitive models, Interaction Styles.

subjects.name: Computer Vision and its Applications
subjects.context: Image sensors, Object Detection, optical flow.

subjects.name: Distributed Systems
subjects.context: Logical clocks, Distributed Mutual Exclusion, RPC.

subjects.name: Computational Geometry
subjects.context: Convex hulls, Voronoi diagrams, Delaunay triangulations.

subjects.name: Embedded Systems
subjects.context: ARM SoC, RTOS, Interfacing (UART, SPI, CAN bus), Hardware/Software Co-design.

subjects.name: Project-1
subjects.context: 6 Credits (0-0-12). Initial system design, requirement gathering, and architectural planning for a capstone implementation.

Semester_8.focus: Final system delivery and specialized open electives.

subjects.name: Cryptography and Network Security
subjects.context: Symmetric Ciphers (DES), Public Key Encryption (RSA), IPSec.

subjects.name: Speech and Natural Language Processing
subjects.context: Morphology, N-gram models, POS tagging, Parsing.

subjects.name: Parallel Computing
subjects.context: Shared memory programming, MPI, GPU programming (CUDA).

subjects.name: Big Data Analytics
subjects.context: Hadoop, Spark, Graph Processing.

subjects.name: Neural Networks and Deep Learning
subjects.context: Perceptrons, CNNs (AlexNet, ResNet), RNNs.

subjects.name: Artificial Intelligence
subjects.context: State space search, Heuristics, Minimax, Predicate Logic.

subjects.name: Quantum Computing
subjects.context: Qubits, Entanglement, Shor's algorithm, Grover search.

subjects.name: Internet of Things
subjects.context: Sensors/Actuators, SDN for IoT, Fog Computing.

subjects.name: Electronic Design Automation
subjects.context: VLSI design, HDLs (VERILOG/VHDL), System Verilog.

subjects.name: Project-2
subjects.context: 6 Credits (0-0-12). Capstone project involving design, development, and evaluation of a complete system.
